{{Quote|Take in the '''first squad''', Slssk... I'll follow with the '''rest''' of the crew.|Beilert Valance to [[Slssk]] the Hutlarian|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 16">[[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]]</ref>}}
'''Hutlarians''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] who possessed [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and orange skin. Native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Hutlar]], a small, dim and chilly planet located within the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]], Hutlarians had a reputation for being tough. For millennia members of the species served as bodyguards and shock troops for the Senex and [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex]] lords.
